description: Plan a technical decompression dive to 50 meters for 20 minutes of bottom time using Trimix 21/35 (21% O2, 35% He, 44% N2) as the bottom gas and EAN50 (50% O2) as a decompression gas. Set the bottom SAC rate to 20 L/min and the deco SAC rate to 15 L/min. Generate the decompression plan and save the dive to the logbook.
